title: Ukrainian Beef Flank Steak Stir-Fry
description: A kid-friendly dish featuring sous-vide beef flank steak, fresh dill, and a hint of lemon, all in a snappy and flavorful sauce. This recipe is low in carbs and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Season the beef flank steak with salt and black pepper.
Place the steak in a vacuum-sealable bag and seal it at 130°F (54°C) for 2 hours.
Sear the steak in a hot skillet with olive oil for 2-3 minutes per side.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Heat the chicken broth in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Mince the garlic and add it to the skillet, cooking for another minute.
Add the lemon juice and stir to combine.
Stir in the fresh dill, salt, and black pepper.
Return the sliced beef to the skillet and toss it with the sauce.
Serve the beef hot, topped with chopped fresh parsley and a dollop of sour cream.
Serve with a side of steamed vegetables or a simple green salad, if desired.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
